questions.question: Which attribute hides decorative icons from screen readers?
questions.explanation: aria-hidden="true" tells screen readers to ignore the element, used for decorative icons.

questions.question: What CSS property makes an SVG icon inherit the text color?
questions.explanation: fill: currentColor makes SVG icons match the surrounding text color.

questions.question: Which of these is a popular icon library?
questions.explanation: Font Awesome, Bootstrap Icons, and Material Icons are all popular free icon libraries.

questions.question: How do you increase the size of a Font Awesome icon?
options: Set font-size on the icon element
questions.explanation: Font Awesome icons use font-size for sizing since they are font-based. Set font-size on the <i> or <span> element.

questions.question: What is the main advantage of SVG icons over icon fonts?
options: SVGs render crisply at any size and can be multi-colored
questions.explanation: SVGs scale without quality loss at any resolution and support multiple colors within a single icon.

questions.question: How do you change the color of a Font Awesome icon?
questions.explanation: Font Awesome icons inherit text color, so setting the CSS color property changes their color.

questions.question: What is the correct way to include Font Awesome in a project?
options: Use a CDN link or package manager (npm)
Write CSS for each icon manually
questions.explanation: Font Awesome can be loaded via CDN (<link> or <script>) or installed via npm/yarn for build tool integration.

questions.question: What does do in Font Awesome?
options: Creates a home icon using the solid style
questions.explanation: fas = Font Awesome Solid, fa-home = the home icon. This renders a solid-style home icon.

questions.question: How should functional icons (like a search button) be made accessible?
options: Add a text label or aria-label for screen readers
questions.explanation: Functional icons need text labels (visually hidden or via aria-label) so screen reader users understand their purpose.

questions.question: What is an icon sprite system?
options: A single SVG file containing multiple icons loaded once and referenced by ID
questions.explanation: An SVG sprite combines many icons into one file, reducing HTTP requests. Icons are referenced via <use href="sprite.svg#icon-name">.

questions.question: How do you add spacing around icons?
options: Use padding or margin on the icon element
questions.explanation: Icons are inline/inline-block elements, so standard CSS padding and margin create spacing around them.

questions.question: What is the advantage of using inline SVGs over external SVG files?
options: Inline SVGs can be styled with CSS and are accessible for animation
Inline SVGs load faster from a CDN
questions.explanation: Inline SVGs in HTML can be styled with CSS, animated, and manipulated with JavaScript without extra HTTP requests.

questions.question: Which Bootstrap Icons class prefix is used?
questions.explanation: Bootstrap Icons uses the 'bi-' prefix, e.g., .

questions.question: What is a key difference between icon fonts and SVG icons?
options: SVG icons can be multi-colored; icon fonts are limited to one color per glyph
Icon fonts work offline; SVGs don't
questions.explanation: Icon fonts render each icon as a single character (one color). SVGs can have multiple colors and gradients within one icon.

questions.question: How do you vertically align an icon with adjacent text?
questions.explanation: vertical-align: middle aligns the icon with the middle of adjacent text for proper visual alignment.

questions.question: What does the Material Icons class 'material-icons-outlined' do?
questions.explanation: Material Icons offers different styles: filled (default), outlined, round, sharp, and two-tone, each with a different class.

questions.question: How can you use icons with pseudo-elements (::before/::after)?
options: Set content to the icon's unicode or HTML entity
questions.explanation: Font icons can be added via content property with their unicode character, e.g., content: '\f007';

questions.question: What is the best approach for icons in buttons?
options: Use icons only without text for a cleaner look
Use icons with text labels for clarity and accessibility
Always use emoji instead of icons
questions.explanation: Buttons with icons and text labels provide the best usability and accessibility. If using only icons, add aria-labels.

questions.question: What does loading an icon library from a CDN impact?
options: Page performance — adds HTTP requests and bandwidth
questions.explanation: CDN-loaded icon libraries add HTTP requests and file size. Use only the icons you need or tree-shake to minimize impact.

questions.question: What is tree-shaking in the context of icon libraries?
options: Removing unused icons from the bundle to reduce file size
Organizing icons in a folder structure
Aligning icons to look like a tree
Shaking the icon element for animation
questions.explanation: Tree-shaking is a build process that eliminates unused icons from the final bundle, reducing file size.
